prompt: A luxurious tourism poster for {argument name="destination" default="Malaysia"}, designed as a vertical fine-art travel advertisement on a clean ivory-white textured background with subtle embossed ornamental patterns. The composition is built around one long flowing red-and-gold batik silk ribbon that sweeps diagonally and spirals through the page, forming an elegant S-curve and visually containing a dreamlike collage of landmarks, culture, and nature. At the top left, warm golden sunrise light pours over misty tropical mountains and rainforest with a waterfall, dense palms, and a large rhinoceros hornbill perched beside hibiscus flowers and white tropical blossoms. In the upper center, a detailed Kuala Lumpur skyline rises from mist, dominated by the Petronas Twin Towers, with the KL Tower and several modern skyscrapers visible. Near the upper right floats 1 colorful traditional wau kite with floral patterns against open white space. In the middle left, include 1 grand mosque with multiple domes and minarets set among palms and haze. In the middle center-right, include the historic Sultan Abdul Samad Building with its copper domes and clocktower. In the lower middle left, include 1 elevated red-and-silver urban train crossing through the city. In the lower center, show 1 ornate Chinatown gate labeled Jalan Petaling, decorated with red lanterns and bustling pedestrians. In the lower right-middle, depict the Batu Caves area with 1 towering golden Murugan statue and 1 steep rainbow staircase climbing into limestone cliffs, surrounded by crowds. At the lower right, nestle 1 landscaped city park with a turquoise lake and fountains. Purple orchids and tropical flowers are woven into the ribbon and foreground in several places. At the very bottom right, show 1 small traditional dancer in red and gold attire twirling the trailing end of the ribbon. The collage should feel luminous, hyper-detailed, majestic, and celebratory, blending photorealistic architecture with painterly fantasy travel-poster styling, soft clouds, atmospheric haze, and glowing highlights. Add elegant poster typography in the lower left: the main headline reads {argument name="headline text" default="VISIT MALAYSIA 2026"}, a smaller location line reads {argument name="location text" default="KUALA LUMPUR"}, a blue script tourism slogan reads {argument name="tagline" default="Malaysia Truly Asia"}, and below that a small refined subheading reads {argument name="subheading" default="Where Diversity Converges\nKuala Lumpur, City of Wonders\nThe Heart of Asia"}. Use a premium color palette of gold, crimson, ivory, emerald, sky blue, and tropical greens, with polished editorial composition and high-end destination-branding aesthetics.
translatedPrompt: 一款为 {argument name="destination" default="马来西亚"} 设计的奢华旅游海报，采用竖版艺术旅行广告风格，背景为干净的象牙白纹理，并带有精致的浮雕装饰图案。画面构图围绕一条飘逸的红金相间蜡染丝带展开，丝带呈对角线螺旋贯穿页面，形成优雅的 S 型曲线，巧妙地串联起如梦似幻的地标、文化与自然景观拼贴。左上角，温暖的金色晨曦洒在云雾缭绕的热带山脉和雨林之上，瀑布飞流直下，茂密的棕榈树旁，一只巨大的犀鸟栖息在木槿花和白色热带花卉间。上方中央，吉隆坡天际线在薄雾中升起，以双峰塔（Petronas Twin Towers）为主体，隐约可见吉隆坡塔（KL Tower）及多座现代摩天大楼。右上角附近漂浮着 1 只色彩斑斓的传统月亮风筝（Wau kite），在留白的背景中格外醒目。中左侧包含 1 座坐落在棕榈树与烟雾中的宏伟清真寺，拥有多个圆顶和尖塔。中右侧包含历史悠久的苏丹阿都沙末大厦（Sultan Abdul Samad Building），展现其铜制圆顶与钟楼。左下方包含 1 列穿行于城市中的红银相间高架列车。底部中央展示 1 座装饰华丽的唐人街牌坊，标有“Jalan Petaling”字样，点缀着红灯笼和熙熙攘攘的行人。右下方描绘了黑风洞（Batu Caves）区域，包括 1 座高耸的金色姆鲁干神像和 1 条通往石灰岩悬崖的陡峭彩虹阶梯，周围人群攒动。右下角点缀着 1 座景观城市公园，配有绿松石色的湖泊与喷泉。紫色兰花和热带花卉穿插在丝带与前景的多处。最右下角展示 1 位身着红金服饰的传统舞者，正舞动着丝带的末端。整幅拼贴画应呈现出明亮、超细节、宏伟且充满庆典感的氛围，将写实建筑与绘画感旅行海报风格相结合，辅以柔和的云雾、大气层薄雾和发光高光。左下方添加优雅的海报排版：主标题为 {argument name="headline text" default="VISIT MALAYSIA 2026"}，较小的地点行显示为 {argument name="location text" default="KUALA LUMPUR"}，蓝色的手写体旅游标语为 {argument name="tagline" default="Malaysia Truly Asia"}，下方附带一行精致的小副标题：{argument name="subheading" default="Where Diversity Converges\nKuala Lumpur, City of Wonders\nThe Heart of Asia"}。采用金色、深红、象牙白、祖母绿、天蓝和热带绿的高端配色方案，呈现出精美的编辑级构图与高端目的地品牌美学。

breakdown.creativeCore: 2026 年马来西亚旅游海报：一款高端竖版旅游海报，展示了马来西亚的地标、文化与热带风情，是目的地营销和活动视觉宣传的理想之选。
breakdown.subject: 空间
breakdown.text: 包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, editorial, fantasy, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
